details.heading: Your transaction is secure
details.content: We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more

about_item: How We Achieve Stress-Free & Safe Play: Through a semi-open and expandable design, safe and sturdy build, and ease of access.
Semi-Open & Expandable: Creates a stress-free environment and allows you to add more panels as your dog grows.
Safe & Sturdy Build: No sharp edges and strong construction prevent injuries and withstand jumping.
Ease of Access: Threshold-free gate allows easy walk-in cleaning for humans and worry-free running for dogs.

authors_reviews.title: Small but perfect
authors_reviews.text: This is really small but it is perfect for me. I bought it to use as Bellas place to go potty so its just the right size. This way she cant get off the pad because its enclosed at just a fraction over 22” it doesnt take up much room at all. If you live in an apartment its perfect.
authors_reviews.author: Carolyn Leigh

authors_reviews.title: Perfection!
authors_reviews.text: We absolutely LOVE these products! I currently have 4 pens from FXW! They are all for different occasions so we do not have to take down one to take it somewhere. We have one for a small pen outside if we need to keep our big dogs contained on the occasion we have someone come over. We have 2 small ones inside to keep our inside babies in while at work. We have one more that we keep in our camper for camping trips! We absolutely LOVE them! They are easily transformed into the pen you need them to be. I would highly suggest FXW pens for your needs!
authors_reviews.author: Jessica

authors_reviews.title: Not for very small dogs!
authors_reviews.text: The pen is very nice and sturdy. Although I would not recommend for very small dogs. My 11 week old Yorkie got her mouth caught sideways between the bars of the pen.
authors_reviews.author: Veela

authors_reviews.title: Nice containment pen
authors_reviews.text: Have used this playpen for about 3 months and it is well made, tall enough to discourage my pup from trying to jump over it, but probably not for a large dog. My pup is a small-medium size dog.
authors_reviews.author: James

authors_reviews.title: Small fenced cage
authors_reviews.text: Cute and built well. Fits perfect in my small office at work.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: It’s great!
authors_reviews.text: My little dog had spinal surgery and had to keep him confined until he was doing better.I put his bed in this and so much better then having him in a crate to recover.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Love It
authors_reviews.text: Glad I purchased, beats having to keep them in a cage. Easy to move around.
authors_reviews.author: TeeM

authors_reviews.title: Doesn't contain clever puppies.
authors_reviews.text: Puppies can climb out of pen because the sides act as ladders. It also moves about. The puppies are small, but together they can push this around the hardwood floors and relocate themselves, even with pillows and toys inside with them. Maybe it wouldn't move on other surfaces.Accidentally added this to my cart instead of the one I wanted. I tried to cancel it immediately, but they would not cancel. They are charging for shipping returns and it doesn't state how much will be deducted from the return. Kind of an inconvenience scam.Maybe it can be used for something else. It's pretty stable and constructed well. Maybe a fence to keep rabbit out of the herbs??
authors_reviews.author: M. Jones
